ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the model (e.g., decision tree, random forest) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  "features" TEXT /* List of features in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_iterations" (
  "iter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the iteration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the iteration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the iteration (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_iterations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "iter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model iteration */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., AUC, log loss, precision) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_iter_id FOREIGN KEY ("iter_id") REFERENCES model_iterations ("iter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_metric_type FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  "calculation_formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "iter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model iteration */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., categorical, numerical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_param_name FOREIGN KEY ("param_name") REFERENCES parameter_types ("param_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_iter_id FOREIGN KEY ("iter_id") REFERENCES model_iterations ("iter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_types" (
  "param_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter type */,
  "param_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter type */,
  "allowed_values" TEXT /* Allowed values for the parameter type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "iter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model iteration */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* The report file itself */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_reports_iter_id FOREIGN KEY ("iter_id") REFERENCES model_iterations ("iter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "iter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model iteration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* The comment text itself */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_iter_id FOREIGN KEY ("iter_id") REFERENCES model_iterations ("iter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_collaborators" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "iter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model iteration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is a collaborator */,
  "collab_date" TEXT /* Date the user became a collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., owner, editor, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborators_iter_id FOREIGN KEY ("iter_id") REFERENCES model_iterations ("iter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metric_values" (
  "metric_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)
